heading: Balloting materials under the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act
label: 3406 Balloting materials under the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act
notes: References in TextThe Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act, referred to in text, is , , , which was formerly classified principally to subchapter I–G (§ 1973ff et seq.) of chapter 20 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering in Title 52, Voting and Elections, and is now classified principally to chapter 203 (§ 20301 et seq.) of Title 52. Section 107 of the Act is now classified to . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 99–410100 Stat. 924section 20310 of Title 52Aug. 28, 1986

may be mailed at a post office established outside the United States under , unless such mailing is prohibited by treaty or other international agreement of the United States.section 406 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: As used in this section, the term “balloting materials” has the meaning given that term in section 107 of the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act.
